CommunityApplications.Profile:
**Linearr — the missing show sequencer for Plex.**
Linearr builds custom Plex playlists across multiple TV shows (and their movies) in two ways:
- **Rotation:** round-robin across shows (Show A S01E01 → Show B S01E01 → Show A S01E02 → ...). - **Air Date:** chronological across every show, with multi-part crossovers (Part 1 / Pt. 2 / (N) in episode titles) kept aligned even when they span different shows.
Per-show season range, optional specials, auto-detected associated movies (e.g. *Psych: The Movie*), an optional "Unwatched only" filter, and automatic syncing of newly-aired episodes/seasons (per-playlist toggle to lock if you want).
**Safety:** never deletes media files or library items — only playlists. A runtime guard disables `delete()` on Episodes, Shows, Seasons, and Movies in the Plex API client.
**Repository:** [github.com/gillberg1111/linearr](https://github.com/gillberg1111/linearr) **Support:** open an issue at [github.com/gillberg1111/linearr/issues](https://github.com/gillberg1111/linearr/issues)
